title: The Hardest Problem AI Ever Solved: Demis Hassabis on What He's Really Building
description: A distilled walkthrough of Cleo Abram's interview with Google DeepMind CEO Demis Hassabis — AlphaFold and the protein problem, in-silico drug discovery, AlphaGenome, AlphaGo's "move 37," AI safety, and the abundance future he believes is ~50 years out.
